expectations.text: Lists multiple tasks per component (not one-per-component)
Mirrors back the task list before filing
expectations.evidence: presents list and asks for approval

expectations.text: Filed issues use story(impl): title convention
Issue bodies link parent capability + design sources
Issue bodies reference Step 12 / per-task development flow
No per-task plan inline (no file lists, migration commands, etc.)
expectations.evidence: response does not include a per-task development plan
